description:
The Phoenix Project of Iran is a think tank launched by [Reza Pahlavi](/people/reza-pahlavi) in Washington, D.C. in February 2019. It focuses on post-regime transition planning for Iran, developing policy frameworks and governance proposals for a future secular democratic Iranian state.

The project has produced an Emergency Phase Booklet covering the first six months of a post-Islamic Republic transition, as well as the Iran Prosperity Project for long-term economic planning.
editorial_notes: Launched February 2019 in Washington, D.C. by Reza Pahlavi. Think tank focused on post-regime transition planning. Produced Emergency Phase Booklet and Iran Prosperity Project.
